name: Bharath
notes: 12L + XSA-all (all layers share single KV set from layer 0) + Int4 nibble MLP QAT + Int6 Attn + GPTQ-lite + EMA decay=0.999 + Partial RoPE 25% + Bigram20480 + Trigram10240 + LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + Cosine TTT 30ep (full-model AdamW on val, per-layer LR: 3x MLP-out, 0.5x MLP-in) + sliding-window stride=32 eval + warmdown5000.
